summary: The Docker-based reproduction clones the vulnerable repository commit, mounts it at `/target-repo`, and proves that `downloadPackageManager()` with `version='../../../escaped'` writes the package-manager installation tree outside `VP_HOME`.
expected_security_impact: Running the reproduction should make the binding place the downloaded package manager and shim files outside `VP_HOME/package_manager/pnpm/`, proving path traversal and attacker-controlled file write outside the intended cache root.
actual_observed_result: Running `./reproduction/run.sh` built `evohunt-advisory_008a361d-binding_download_package_manager_path_traversal`, cloned commit `48e49ca0c1c062989120c41bcce9ee1db8b172dd`, and the container printed `outsideHome: true`, an escaped `resolvedInstallDir` under `/tmp/evohunt-vp-.../n1/n2/n3/escaped/pnpm`, a matching `shimPath` under `/tmp/evohunt-vp-.../n1/n2/n3/escaped/pnpm/bin/pnpm`, then emitted `EVOHUNT_POC_SUCCESS`.
verification_method: The verification helper first checks that the mounted target source still contains the vulnerable binding-to-install dataflow, then invokes `downloadPackageManager({ name: 'pnpm', version: '../../../escaped' })`, normalizes the returned install path, and requires both an escaped install directory outside `VP_HOME` and a created shim file before accepting the run.
evidence_produced_by_run: Host-side run output showed `HEAD is now at 48e49ca0 feat(deps): upgrade upstream dependencies (#1375)` before the container was launched.
The container reported a `resolvedInstallDir` under `/tmp/evohunt-vp-.../n1/n2/n3/escaped/pnpm`, which is outside the configured `vpHome` root `/tmp/evohunt-vp-.../n1/n2/n3/vp-home`.
The container reported a `shimPath` under `/tmp/evohunt-vp-.../n1/n2/n3/escaped/pnpm/bin/pnpm`, confirming a shim file was created at the escaped path.
The container emitted the explicit success marker `EVOHUNT_POC_SUCCESS`.

reproduction.source_acquisition: run.sh clones the target repository on the host, checks out the pinned vulnerable commit, and mounts that checkout into the container.
